---
title: 'New Years Eve'
date: '2010-01-02T05:38:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '5109156679615714780'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '861568655343463623'
blogger_filename: '/2010/01/new-years-eve.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/5109156679615714780/feed.atom'
---

&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; I went to pick up Connor from his class New Years Eve. The teacher informs me: "He might be a little slap happy...he is the only one who REFUSED to go to sleep." There is he is... eye stuck wide open watching T.V. as others sleep around him. He went from 8pm to 1am in class without a wink of sleep... <br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Darrell
